title: abarema borneensis
intro: Abarema borneensis, also known as the borneo coral tree, is a species of flowering plant in the family Fabaceae. Traditionally used in herbal medicine, the plant is valued for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Abarema borneensis include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support immune function. The plant is typically prepared as a decoction, infusion, or tincture, and is used in traditional medicine practices to treat various ailments.
